initial_tasks: PERCEIVE: read state/current-state.json, focus.json, from-creator.md, git log -5
REFLECT: grep patterns.jsonl for relevant tags, identify bottleneck, highest-EV next action
DECIDE: write explicit decision — What / Why / How / Done-when / Risk
ACT: execute the decided work (one focused accomplishment)
CONSOLIDATE: append patterns.jsonl, update context.json, anchor milestones
PERSIST: git add, commit C{N}: summary, git push
